name: telecheck-command-center
description: Local viewer for the Telecheck spec bundle.

scripts.build:embed: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const b='Telecheck Master Bundle FINAL US REGION BASELINE';const out={};for(const f of fs.readdirSync(b).sort())if(f.endsWith('.md'))out[f]=fs.readFileSync(p.join(b,f),'utf8');fs.writeFileSync('docs-data.js','window.DOCS = '+JSON.stringify(out)+';');console.log('embedded',Object.keys(out).length,'docs')"
